title: Samsung Plans to Invest in Mistral AI, Aiming to Break the Monopoly of U.S. Tech Giants
excerpt: Samsung Electronics is in talks to invest hundreds of millions of euros in the French AI startup Mistral. This funding will help Mistral build competitiveness i
content_html:
Samsung Electronics is in talks to invest hundreds of millions of euros in the French AI startup Mistral. This funding will help Mistral build competitiveness in the market and develop mainstream artificial intelligence solutions that can rival those of U.S. technology giants. According to sources, after this round of funding, Mistral's valuation is expected to reach around 20 billion euros.

The investment by Samsung is expected to be 1 billion euros, and the company had previously invested in Mistral through its venture capital division. The negotiations reflect a major trend currently facing the industry, which is the sharp increase in demand for computing power, while the corresponding computing resources remain in short supply. Therefore, more and more AI development companies are seeking partnerships with semiconductor suppliers to meet market demand.

In this context, Mistral has taken advantage of the opportunity to attract financial support from various sources. Especially in the case where the U.S. government has banned foreign entities from obtaining Anthropic's latest AI models, European and Asian companies and governments are increasingly eager to reduce their reliance on U.S. AI technology. Mistral focuses on open-source AI models, allowing customers to customize the models, thus avoiding the risk of being remotely shut down by enterprises or governments.

Mistral's funding plan also includes the Scaleup Europe Fund under EQT, a Swedish institution, which has received support from the European Commission and is committed to supporting promising European companies. Mistral's collaboration with Samsung will take place in an environment where the AI industry is facing a shortage of chips. Recently, a U.S. memory manufacturer, Micron, has reached a partnership with Anthropic, while Mistral is also expanding its cooperation with early investor Microsoft, which has committed to investing "billions of dollars" to purchase Mistral's computing infrastructure services.

sentences.zh: 尤其是在美国政府禁止外国实体获取Anthropic最新AI模型的情况下，欧洲和亚洲的企业和政府越来越渴望减少对美国AI技术的依赖。

sentences.zh: Mistral的融资计划还包括瑞典机构EQT旗下的Scaleup Europe基金，该基金得到了欧盟委员会的支持，致力于支持有前途的欧洲企业。

sentences.en: Mistral's collaboration with Samsung will take place in an environment where the AI industry is facing a shortage of chips.
sentences.zh: Mistral与三星的合作将在AI行业面临芯片短缺的环境下进行。

sentences.en: Recently, a U.S. memory manufacturer, Micron, has reached a partnership with Anthropic, while Mistral is also expanding its cooperation with early investor Microsoft, which has committed to investing "billions of dollars" to purchase Mistral's computing infrastructure services.
sentences.zh: 最近，美国内存制造商美光公司与Anthropic达成合作伙伴关系，而Mistral也在扩大与早期投资者微软的合作，微软已承诺投资“数十亿美元”购买Mistral的计算基础设施服务。

content_html_zh:
三星电子正在洽谈向法国人工智能初创公司 Mistral 投资数亿欧元。 这笔资金将帮助米斯特拉尔建立市场竞争力，并开发可与美国科技巨头相媲美的主流人工智能解决方案。 消息人士称，本轮融资后，Mistral的估值预计将达到200亿欧元左右。

三星的投资预计为10亿欧元，该公司此前曾通过其风险投资部门投资Mistral。 此次谈判反映了当前行业面临的一个大趋势，即算力需求急剧增加，而相应的计算资源却依然供不应求。 因此，越来越多的人工智能开发公司正在寻求与半导体供应商的合作伙伴关系，以满足市场需求。

在此背景下，米斯特拉尔利用这一机会吸引了多方资金支持。 尤其是在美国政府禁止外国实体获取Anthropic最新AI模型的情况下，欧洲和亚洲的企业和政府越来越渴望减少对美国AI技术的依赖。 Mistral专注于开源AI模型，允许客户定制模型，从而避免被企业或政府远程关闭的风险。

Mistral的融资计划还包括瑞典机构EQT旗下的Scaleup Europe基金，该基金得到了欧盟委员会的支持，致力于支持有前途的欧洲企业。 Mistral与三星的合作将在AI行业面临芯片短缺的环境下进行。 最近，美国内存制造商美光公司与Anthropic达成合作伙伴关系，而Mistral也在扩大与早期投资者微软的合作，微软已承诺投资“数十亿美元”购买Mistral的计算基础设施服务。
